ogTitle: Atherton vs Atkinsons Dam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Atherton and Atkinsons Dam.
heading: Atherton vs Atkinsons Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Atherton, Queensland and Atkinsons Dam, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Atherton has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Atkinsons Dam (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Atherton or Atkinsons Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Atherton has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Atkinsons Dam scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Atherton scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Atkinsons Dam scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Atherton or Atkinsons Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Atherton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
